title: Primitive creatures
description: A small mod adding primitive creatures, inspired by the TerraFirmaCraft
body:
A small mod adding primitive creatures, inspired by the TerraFirmaCraft mod, more creatures will be added over time.

At this point, the mod adds:

 

•Kaolin clayze•

This is an earth golem that can become a stable source of clay, periodically firing clay at you. His appearance is a reference and pun associated with the most legendary resources in TFC.they will spawn in Nether
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/715ddce0bdc7aa85159f22b48ba9ddaa2d302a72.gif)
 

•Graphite glayze•

This is a stone golem that can become a stable source of coal.When he sees you, he will start attacking ( is more protected) but if you attack him, he will be afraid of you for a while. His appearance is a reference and pun related to the second most legendary resource in TFC.__they will spawn in Nether
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GfUwaZEm/images/e7739fef0041ce0cda6397d86b93371de77df143.gif)

 •Mussel warden•

Who would have thought that Sculk evolved from mussels? Yes. Although it is a primitive version of Warden, it is still dangerous. It appears during thunderstorms.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GfUwaZEm/images/8c76fbf8ed6ecd6104be8edb94bd7b48cba55200.png)

Primal Illagers

All Primal Illagers appear rarely, but they can appear at any time of the day and in any biome of the upper world:

  

 •Inhabitant•

the most classic Illagers of the primitive world.

 ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/706028f26c879b10cb86326dfa6593ef2f5c5d9a.png)


 

•Wanderer•

He's a little weak, but he's more agile.

 ![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GfUwaZEm/images/04993dbeb161073096006a3361e4313a31761597.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04993dbeb161073096006a3361e4313a31761597.png)


 

•Bonebreaker•

He is more armored and his hammer is a crushing blow.

![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8471fcde22ed921615f91a88a43d9d829e7493ee.png)

 

•Stalker•

With a blowpipe, he probably knows how much poison is needed to kill an enemy.

![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e26657c34155458b2033fdac2d48d4aca510afe1.png)

 

•Hunter•

His venom will literally dry you up, he also knows how to hide when he's in danger.

![7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4467fe58993ca8c6562f680a57e05a8704925519.png)

 

•Shaman•

A big shot of the primitive world, extracting gunpowder from a creeper, he invented a worthy use for it.

![77](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52b7dcfe90b714748bb4c042c2310d46f1d51fe6.png)

 

•Herbalist•

Having a lot of experience in herbs, he found those that can lure terrifying beasts.

![22](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c4a542fde1adc9d0eb5a1f10b2e699f5aa9845e.png)

 

•Beast•

An armored beast filled with primal rage, but some herbs will lure it.

![22](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GfUwaZEm/images/d84f2c5506ce6333a864337d035bf03f18a5e17c.png)


•Huntsman•

An animal catcher, he can immobilize you with a single precise blow.

![22](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GfUwaZEm/images/257a53c14ebc73e6888eb1ef0e3bd643c9681c91.png)

•Mercenary•

It's not exactly Illagers, but it also doesn't tolerate strangers, BUT you can hire it by giving it idols, and then it will protect you to the end

![22](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GfUwaZEm/images/283337220a2fe3ae53a9d5a845d1f0778b63c4bd.png)
